name: Nippon Kanryu Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Nippon Kanryu Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the construction business. The company is involved in the traffic safety facilities, landscape, and other construction works, as well as civil engineering, law related disaster prevention, and river and sabo related works. It also sells materials related to various construction works; disaster prevention goods; and industrial safety and health supplies, as well as provides structure repair related services. In addition, the company produces chemicals, such as insoluble sulfur, as well as manufactures natural soil herbs. Nippon Kanryu Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.

name: Obayashi Corp.
summary: Obayashi Corporation engages in the construction business in Japan, North America, Asia, the Middle East, Europe, and Oceania. The company constructs buildings, including offices, condominiums, commercial facilities, factories, hospitals, and schools; and civil engineering projects, such as tunnels, bridges, dams, riverbanks, railroads, and expressways. It is also involved in the development and leasing of real estate properties in various locations, primarily in metropolitan areas, as well as property management activities; solar, biomass, hydropower, geothermal, and wind power generation business; and PPP and agriculture business. In addition, the company sells materials and equipment for construction; develops and sells computer software; sells and leases electronic equipment; offers finance-related services; and operates golf clubs. Further, it engages in the provision of urban development, contracted engineering, management, consultancy services, etc.; and is involved in the M&E design and construction activities. The company was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Saita Corporation
summary: Saita Corporation engages in the construction and crushed stone businesses in Japan. It undertakes various civil work projects, such as roads, rivers, land construction, water and sewerage, agricultural civil engineering, and disaster restoration. The company also produces and sells liquors, sake, and shochu; and sells imported goods and HFC products. In addition, it engages in water treatment, security, and cargo transportation businesses. Saita Corporation was founded in 1923 and is based in Asakura, Japan.

name: Higashimaru Co.,Ltd.
summary: Higashimaru Co.,Ltd. produces and sells marine and food products in Japan. It offers yellowtail and mixed feeds for various fish farms; and dried and instant noodles, dish udon, noodle soups, snacks, etc. The company also exports its products to 19 countries. Higashimaru Co., Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Kagoshima, Japan.

name: Marutai Co.,Ltd.
summary: Marutai Co.,Ltd. produces and sells noodles, seasonings, and confectionery products in Japan. It offers instant, stick-like, cup, and fried noodles; and cupcakes, tildes, assortments, and other products. The company was formerly known as Marutai Taimeido Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Marutai Co.,Ltd. in 1990. Marutai Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.

name: DAIEISANGYO Co.,Ltd.
summary: DAIEISANGYO Co.,Ltd. engages in the condominium and housing business in Japan. The company primarily sells newly built condominiums and single-family homes. It is also involved in the development and sale of residential land; housing construction contract; and planning and sale of used homes, as well as planning, design, construction of housing renovation projects. DAIEISANGYO Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Kitakyushu, Japan.

name: Isetan Mitsukoshi Holdings Ltd.
summary: Isetan Mitsukoshi Holdings Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the department store business in Japan and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Department Store Business, Credit & Finance/Customer Organization Management Business, Real Estate Business, and Other Business. It is involved in the credit card, insurance, and other businesses; constructs and manages underground garages, public underground passages, and underground shopping malls; leases shops; operates restaurants; operates shares and business management, and online mall and others; commercial and corporate management consulting; and designs, constructs, operates, and leases real estate properties, as well as offers tenant leasing and building maintenance and environment production services. The company also offers employment agency, recruitment office, personnel, education and training, and labor and welfare services, as well as information systems solutions. In addition, it engages in the supermarket, retail, and specialty shops; food production; and wholesaling business, as well as operates airport style duty free shops. Further, the company plans, develops, imports, and sells gifts, novelty, and lifestyle goods; imports and wholesales western wine and spirits, foods, and miscellaneous products; and sells foodstuffs, clothing, and other daily goods. Additionally, it plans, produces, promotes, and sells commercials, video signs, TV programs, movies, plays, entertainment and fashion shows, parties, etc.; engages in advertising agency business; plans and sells travel products and conducts tours; owns and operates river cruise ships; and operates beauty and hair salons and sports clubs, and sells cosmetics. The company was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Ohishi Sangyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Ohishi Sangyo Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells industrial packaging materials in Japan. It offers pulp moulds that are used in livestock, agricultural, and industrial applications; and thermoplastic films, such as polystyrene and T-die embossed films, and polyethylene bags, as well as film coatings. The company also provides heavy duty bags, including multi-walled sack kraft bags, which are used for chemicals, plastics, flours, foods, animal feeds, and fertilizers, as well as form fill seals for use in plastics, such as poly-olefins; and corrugated boards that are used for industrial and agricultural applications. In addition, it offers cradle, a container for packing strawberries. The company was founded in 1947 and is based in Kitakyushu, Japan.

name: PBsystems,Inc.
summary: PBsystems,Inc. engages in the construction of private cloud systems in Japan. The company offers a virtual system from business system to space. It also manufactures and sells 4D King, a shared 3D VR theater. PBsystems,Inc. was founded in 1997 and is based in Fukuoka, Japan.

name: Takeda Pharmaceutical Co. Ltd.
summary: Takeda Pharmaceutical Company Limited engages in the research, development, manufacturing, and marketing of pharmaceutical products, over-the-counter medicines and quasi-drug consumer products, and other healthcare products. It offers pharmaceutical products in the areas of gastroenterology; oncology; neuroscience; and rare diseases, such as rare metabolic and hematology, and heredity angioedema, as well as plasma-derived therapies and vaccines. The company provides its products under the ENTYVIO, GATTEX/REVESTIVE, ALOFISEL, NATPARA, ADYNOVATE/ADYNOVI, TAKHZYRO, ELAPRASE, VPRIV, GAMMAGARD LIQUID/KIOVIG, HYQVIA, CUVITRU, ALBUMIN/FLEXBUMIN, NINLARO, and ALUNBRIG brands. It operates in Japan, the United States, Europe and Canada, Russia/CIS, Latin America, rest of Asia, the Middle East, Oceania, and Africa. The company has licensing agreements with TESARO, Inc., Denali Therapeutics, and Wave Life Sciences Ltd; collaboration agreements with Rani Therapeutics LLC, Novimmune S.A., AB Biosciences Inc., Sosei Group Corporation, and LogicBio Therapeutics, Inc.; strategic collaboration with Prometheus Biosciences, Inc; a license and research agreement with The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center; a research collaboration agreements with Enzyre BV and Cerevance; a collaboration agreement with Artisan Bio, Inc.; and a multi-target rare disease collaboration with Evox Therapeutics Ltd., as well as licensing agreement with ProThera Biologics Inc. It also has a strategic alliance with Egle Therapeutics SAS and Evotec SE; a strategic partnership with Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc.; Carmine Therapeutics and HemoShear Therapeutics, LLC; strategic collaboration with KSQ Therapeutics to research, develop, and commercialize immune-based therapies for cancer; and strategic collaboration with Anima Biotech. Takeda Pharmaceutical Company Limited was founded in 1781 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Sankei Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Sankei Chemical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells plant protection materials for agricultural products in Japan. It offers insecticides, fungicides, pheromone agents, herbicides, spreading agents, soil fumigants, agricultural materials, pest control agents, and others. The company was formerly known as Kagoshima Kagaku Kogyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sankei Chemical Co., Ltd. in January 1962. Sankei Chemical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Kagoshima, Japan.

name: Taiheiyo Cement Corporation
summary: Taiheiyo Cement Corporation engages in cement, mineral resources, environmental, and construction materials businesses in Japan and internationally. The company's Cement segment offers ordinary Portland cement, specialty cement, soil stabilizers, and ready-mixed concrete. Its Mineral Resources segment sells limestone aggregate products comprising course and fine aggregate used in ready-mixed concrete, and aggregate used in concrete products and civil engineering; sandstone and andesite as aggregate materials; quicklime, slaked lime, filler, silica, and silica powder; and hollow ceramics, sepiolite, wollastonite, and kaolin, as well as recycles surplus construction soil. The company's Environmental segment recycles used tires, waste plastics, paper sludge, waste casting sand, other industrial waste, surplus soil from water purification, sewage sludge, dredging sludge, and other wastes discarded from municipalities, as well as engages in the CFC treatment and building waste treatment plants; develops and commercializes environmental recycling technologies, including ash washing system and applied kiln system; supplies flue gas desulfurization materials, such as calcium carbonate to coal-fired power plants; and sells slag powder and other inorganic materials, coal, heavy oil, and other fuels, as well as chemicals and gypsum. Its Construction Materials segment produces precast concrete products; promenades, interlocking blocks, and concrete housing products; acoustic panels used to reduce construction noise; and fireproof covering materials used in tunnels. The company's Other Businesses segment leases land for office buildings, commercial stores, leisure facilities, distribution warehouses, and other structures, as well as develops land for residential housing; and engages in data processing, transportation and warehouse, engineering, chemical products, and sports businesses. Taiheiyo Cement Corporation was founded in 1881 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Showa Manufacturing Co.,Ltd.
summary: Showa Manufacturing Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells heat source and hot water supply products in Japan. It also offers air conditioning, environmental, cityscape, casting, and special heat source products. The company was founded in 1883 and is headquartered in Fukuoka City, Japan.

name: Amaze Co., Ltd.
summary: Amaze Co., Ltd. engages in the hotel and restaurant businesses in Japan. It operates a chain of hotels under the HOTEL AZ name. The company was founded in 1911 and is headquartered in Oita, Japan.

name: YASKAWA Electric Corporation
summary: YASKAWA Electric Corporation engages in motion control, robotics, system engineering, and other businesses worldwide. It manufactures and sells various AC drives, including general purpose AC drives, medium-voltage AC drives, system-use AC drives, and power regenerative units for use in cranes, fans, pumps, machine tools, conveyors, automated warehouses, and metal working machinery; and rotary servo motors, direct drive servo motors, linear servo motors, machine controllers, and machine vision systems that are used in chip mounters, robots, and metal working machinery. The company also offers arc and spot welding, handling/assembling, collaborative, biomedical, palletizing, press handling, sealing/cutting/laser machining, deburring, painting, glass substrates transfer, and semiconductor wafer transfer robots for use in semiconductor/liquid crystal manufacturing, arc welding, spot welding, palletizing, painting, and handling and assembly applications. In addition, it provides industrial system electrical products, such as medium-voltage AC drives, system use AC drives, and system controllers for use in iron and steel systems, water and wastewater treatment, and paper-making/film/port cargo handling/fiber/printing applications. Further, the company offers equipment for energy saving and creation comprising PV inverters, systems for large wind turbines, control equipment for small-scale power generation, and motor drive systems for use in photovoltaic power generation and electric vehicles. YASKAWA Electric Corporation was founded in 1915 and is headquartered in Kitakyushu, Japan.

name: Nishi-Nippon Financial HoldingsInc.
summary: Nishi-Nippon Financial HoldingsInc. is a financial services group in Japan. The company provides banking, leasing, and other financial services to individuals and businesses. Nishi-Nippon Financial Holdings is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.

name: Misumi Co., Ltd.
summary: Misumi Co., Ltd. provides energy, lifestyle, and food and beverages related products and services in Japan. The company's Energy segment is involved in the wholesale and retail of gasoline, light oil, crude petroleum, lubricants, and other oil related products and LPGs; and provision of delivery services for LPG, as well as construction and inspection services for pressure gas facilities. Its Lifestyle segment engages in the sale of books, CDs, TV games, PCs, and cellular phones; provision of DVD and CD rental services; sale of houses; sale, maintenance, and inspection of cars; and management of commercial complexes, as well as sale of tires. The company's Food & Beverage segment is involved in the management of food chain business; and production and sale of mineral water. The company also manages golf courses; and offers public relations agency services. Misumi Co., Ltd. sells its products through gas stations, service stations, auto gas service stations, store fronts, and outlets. The company was formerly known as Misumi Petroleum Gas Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Misumi Co., Ltd. in April 1989. Misumi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Kagoshima, Japan.

name: Maruto Sangyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Maruto Sangyo Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells laminated films in Japan. The company engages in photogravure printing and bag making; photogravure cylinder making; and sale of paper packaging, packing paper, label stickers, plastic molding products and packing materials, packaging and industrial machinery, agricultural related materials, and horticultural equipment. It also imports and exports packaging materials; designs, constructs, and sells synthetic resin floor materials; installs machinery and appliances; plans, produces, and sells advertising; and provides package design and advertising agency services. Maruto Sangyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.

name: The Chikuho Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Chikuho Bank, Ltd. provides various banking products and services to individual and corporate customers in Japan. The company offers deposits, certificates of deposits, loans, financing, fund management, and management support services. As of September 30, 2020, it operated 44 branches. The company was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Kurume, Japan.

name: The Fukuoka Chuo Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Fukuoka Chuo Bank, Ltd. provides financial services in Japan. The company's deposit products include time deposits and foreign currency deposits; and loan products comprise education, renovation, housing, auto, and apartment loans, as well as real estate secured loans. It also provides mortgage consultation; financing and management consultation; life insurance and non-life insurance; asset management consultation; loan and business consultation; and foreign exchange services. In addition, the company offers debit cards, IC cash cards, and Internet and mobile banking services. It operates through 41 branches. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.

name: The Minami-Nippon Bank,Ltd.
summary: The Minami-Nippon Bank,Ltd. provides various banking products and services to individual and corporate customers in Japan. The company accepts savings, ordinary, time, and reserve time, periodic, and foreign currency deposits; and certificates of deposit. Its loan products include card, free, car, education, and business loans. The company also offers investment trusts and government bonds; life and non-life insurance, and pension products; cash and debit cards; payroll transfer/automatic pension receipt; online fund transfer; and other services, as well as rating agency, fund management, security, and internet and mobile banking services. In addition, it provides leasing; and transport and security services. The company operates 64 branches. The Minami-Nippon Bank,Ltd. was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Kagoshima, Japan.

name: The Howa Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Howa Bank,Ltd. provides various banking products and services to individuals and businesses in Japan. It offers time deposits, mutual funds, and government bonds; housing, reform, card, education, and auto loans; and personal pension, one-time lifetime, life, medical, and fire insurance products. The Howa Bank,Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is based in Oita, Japan.

name: The Miyazaki Taiyo Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Miyazaki Taiyo Bank, Ltd. provides various banking products and services for individual and corporate customers primarily in Japan. The company operates through Banking, and Lease and Guarantee Business segments. It offers deposit, lending, domestic exchange, foreign exchange, and other incidental business services. The company also provides comprehensive leasing and guarantee services, such as personal loans, as well as engages in the venture capital business. It operates through 52 branches. The company was formerly known as K.K. Miyazaki Sogo Ginko and changed its name to The Miyazaki Taiyo Bank, Ltd. in February 1989. The Miyazaki Taiyo Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1941 and is headquartered in Miyazaki, Japan.

name: Fukuoka REIT Corporation
summary: Fukuoka REIT Corporation is a Japanese real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on investing in properties located in the Fukuoka region of Japan. They aim to provide stable income and long-term growth to their investors through a diversified portfolio of real estate assets. The REIT is managed by a separate asset management company and is based in Fukuoka, Japan.

name: HouseFreedom Co.,Ltd.
summary: HouseFreedom Co.,Ltd. engages in the construction of newly detached homes in Japan. The company also leases real estate properties, as well as provides real estate brokerage services. In addition, it offers non-life insurance agency services, such as fire and earthquake insurance; and engages in the nursing care and construction contract businesses. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Matsubara, Japan.

name: Daiichi Koutsu Sangyo Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daiichi Koutsu Sangyo Co.,Ltd. provides passenger transportation services through taxi and bus in Japan. It also engages in the sale and lease of real estate properties, including condominiums, houses, stores, and offices; revitalization of real estate properties; management of condominiums and apartments; operation of auto gas station and hotels; sale of LPG; and provision of car maintenance, visit and home care, nursing care, and elderly housing services. In addition, the company offers real estate backed loans; and radiation shielding products and paints. Further, it is involved in the real estate agency and brokerage, non-life insurance agency, coin parking, golf driving range, mail order, and ship businesses, as well as system and software development, and information communication businesses. Daiichi Koutsu Sangyo Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Kitakyushu, Japan.

name: RKB Mainichi Holdings Corporation
summary: RKB Mainichi Holdings Corporation engages in the radio and television broadcasting business in Japan. The company was founded in 1951 and is based in Fukuoka, Japan.

name: Joyfull Co., Ltd.
summary: Joyfull Co., Ltd. operates a chain of family restaurants in Japan. The company's restaurants offer meals, hamburgers, snacks, desserts, alcoholic beverages, and others. As of May 31, 2018, it operated 801 Joyful stores. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Oita, Japan.
